description: Milestone 8: Knowledge Hub (Wissen). Fetches educational content from the public GitHub repo sebulino/PIRATEN-Kanon, caches it locally, and presents interactive lessons with progress tracking, quizzes, and checklists. Replaces the placeholder KnowledgeView.

userStories.title: Domain models and repository protocol
userStories.description: Create all Knowledge Hub domain models in Core/Domain/Knowledge/: KnowledgeCategory, KnowledgeTopic, QuizQuestion, TopicContent (ContentSection/ChecklistItem/CalloutType with custom Codable), ReadingProgress (ReadingStatus/TopicProgress), KnowledgeIndex (LearningPath), and the KnowledgeRepository protocol with KnowledgeError enum.
acceptanceCriteria: All structs are Identifiable, Equatable, immutable (let properties)
Codable where needed for cache serialization (ContentSection has custom encode/decode)
KnowledgeRepository protocol follows @MainActor pattern like TodoRepository
KnowledgeError enum covers networkError, parsingError, notFound, rateLimited

userStories.title: GitHub API client
userStories.description: Create GitHubAPIClient in Core/Data/Knowledge/ with HTTPClient injection. Supports conditional ETag requests (If-None-Match → 304 handling), raw file fetching via download_url, and rate limit detection from 403 + X-RateLimit headers. Returns GitHubDirectoryResult enum (.modified/.notModified). Follows DiscourseAPIClient pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: GitHubAPIClient injected with HTTPClient, repoOwner, repoName, branch
fetchDirectoryContents supports ETag conditional requests, returns .modified or .notModified
fetchRawFile fetches raw content via download URL
HTTP 403 with rate-limit headers maps to KnowledgeError.rateLimited

userStories.title: YAML frontmatter parser
userStories.description: Create FrontmatterParser in Core/Data/Knowledge/. Detects --- delimited YAML block at start of markdown. Parses simple YAML subset: key: value, key: "quoted value", lists (- item), nested list-of-dicts (for quiz). Returns (fields: [String: Any], body: String)? — nil on malformed input. No external dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Parses all known frontmatter fields (id, title, summary, tags, level, reading_minutes, quiz, related)
Handles quoted and unquoted string values
Handles list fields (tags, related, quiz options)
Returns nil (not crash) on malformed input

userStories.title: Markdown content parser
userStories.description: Create ContentSectionParser in Core/Data/Knowledge/. Splits markdown body by H2 (## ) headings into typed ContentSection values. Recognizes special sections: Kurzüberblick → .overview (bullets), Checkliste → .checklist (- [ ] items), Nächste Schritte → .nextSteps, Mini-Quiz → skip. Detects callout blockquotes (> TIP:, > ACHTUNG:, > MERKSATZ:). Preserves section order.
acceptanceCriteria: Identifies all special section types (overview, checklist, nextSteps)
Detects callouts within sections (TIP, ACHTUNG, MERKSATZ)
Handles edge cases: empty sections, no H2s (whole body = single text section)

userStories.title: File cache manager
userStories.description: Create KnowledgeCacheManager in Core/Data/Knowledge/. Uses FileManager to manage <Caches>/Knowledge/ directory. Methods: readIndex/writeIndex (index.json), readTopicContent/writeTopicContent (topics/{id}.json), clearCache. Atomic writes (temp + rename). Returns nil on read errors. Not @MainActor.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates cache directory on first write
Atomic file writes (write to temp then rename)
Graceful nil returns on corrupt or missing files

userStories.title: RealKnowledgeRepository
userStories.description: Create RealKnowledgeRepository in Core/Data/Knowledge/. Orchestrates GitHubAPIClient, FrontmatterParser, ContentSectionParser, and KnowledgeCacheManager. fetchIndex: cache-first with 24h TTL, ETag conditional requests, parallel category fetching, parses kanon.json + _category.yml + .md frontmatter. fetchTopicContent: cache-first, fetch and parse on miss. Graceful fallback to cached data on network failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Cache-first strategy with 24h TTL for index
ETag conditional requests avoid re-downloading unchanged content
Graceful fallback to cached data on network failure
Ignores _shared and dotfolders when listing categories
Error mapping from GitHub/parsing errors to KnowledgeError

userStories.title: FakeKnowledgeRepository
userStories.description: Create FakeKnowledgeRepository in Core/Data/Knowledge/. Hardcoded 2 categories, 4 topics, 1 sample TopicContent with all section types (overview, text, checklist, quiz, nextSteps, callout). Simulates 100ms delay. Used for previews and tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Provides representative sample data for all UI states and section types

userStories.title: ReadingProgressStore
userStories.description: Create ReadingProgressStore in Core/Data/Storage/. Protocol ReadingProgressStorage with getProgress/getAllProgress/saveProgress/clearAll. Implementation backed by UserDefaults (key piraten_knowledge_progress), JSON-encoded [String: TopicProgress]. Constructor-injected UserDefaults for test isolation. Follows RecentRecipientsStore pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Handles checklist completions and quiz results within TopicProgress

userStories.title: KnowledgeViewModel (home screen)
userStories.description: Create KnowledgeViewModel in App/ViewModels/. Enum KnowledgeLoadState (idle/loading/loaded/error). @MainActor ObservableObject with @Published loadState, index, searchQuery. Computed properties: categories, featuredTopics, inProgressTopics (from progress store), searchResults (filtered by query on title+summary+tags). Methods: loadIndex(forceRefresh:), topicsForCategory. Injected: KnowledgeRepository, ReadingProgressStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Loading/loaded/error state management with enum LoadState
Client-side search filtering (title + summary + tags, case-insensitive)
In-progress topics derived from progress store

userStories.title: KnowledgeTopicDetailViewModel
userStories.description: Create KnowledgeTopicDetailViewModel in App/ViewModels/. Manages content loading, section expand/collapse, checklist toggle persistence, quiz submission, and progress tracking (unread → started on appear → completed on rule). Injected: KnowledgeTopic, KnowledgeRepository, ReadingProgressStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Loads content and restores persisted progress from store
Checklist toggle persists immediately via progress store
Progress transitions: unread → started (on appear) → completed (on completion rule)

userStories.title: Reusable Knowledge UI components
userStories.description: Create components in App/Views/Knowledge/Components/: SectionCard (accordion expand/collapse with spring animation), OverviewCard (always-visible bullet card), ChecklistCard (interactive toggles with onToggle callback and progress label), CalloutView (colored box by type: tip/warning/keyTakeaway), QuizCard (question + options + feedback + score + onComplete), NextStepsCard (related topic links), MarkdownTextView (AttributedString rendering with fallback).
acceptanceCriteria: VoiceOver labels on interactive elements (checklist toggles, quiz buttons, expand/collapse)
Consistent styling with rest of app
MarkdownTextView uses AttributedString(markdown:) with plain-text fallback

userStories.title: KnowledgeView (home screen, replaces placeholder)
userStories.description: Replace placeholder KnowledgeView.swift with full home screen. NavigationStack with .searchable modifier, sections: Empfohlen (horizontal ScrollView, hidden if empty), Weiterlesen (in-progress topics, hidden if empty), Kategorien (LazyVGrid 2-col with category cards → NavigationLink to CategoryDetailView). States: loading/error/loaded/empty. Pull-to-refresh. Uses ScrollView + LazyVStack (not List).
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 states handled (loading, error with retry, loaded, empty)
Search filters topics across all categories
Featured section hidden when kanon.json has no featured
Uses ScrollView + LazyVStack (not List) per project convention

userStories.title: CategoryDetailView
userStories.description: Create CategoryDetailView in App/Views/Main/. Shows category header (icon + title + description) and ScrollView + LazyVStack of topic cards with title, summary (2 lines), reading time, level badge, status icon (unread/started/completed). NavigationLink to KnowledgeTopicDetailView.

userStories.title: KnowledgeTopicDetailView (lesson view)
userStories.description: Create KnowledgeTopicDetailView in App/Views/Main/. Header with title, tags (chips), level, reading time. ScrollView rendering sections: .overview → OverviewCard, .text → SectionCard (collapsed), .checklist → ChecklistCard (interactive), .callout → CalloutView, .quiz → QuizCard, .nextSteps → NextStepsCard. Calls markAsStarted on appear and loadContent on appear. Loading/error states. Offline: shows cached content.
acceptanceCriteria: Offline shows cached content if available

userStories.title: Configuration and AppContainer wiring
userStories.description: Add KNOWLEDGE_REPO_OWNER, KNOWLEDGE_REPO_NAME, KNOWLEDGE_REPO_BRANCH to Debug.xcconfig, Release.xcconfig, Secrets.sample.xcconfig, and Info.plist. Wire in AppContainer: create GitHubAPIClient, KnowledgeCacheManager, RealKnowledgeRepository (production) / FakeKnowledgeRepository (test), ReadingProgressStore, KnowledgeViewModel. Add factory makeKnowledgeTopicDetailViewModel. Update MainTabView to pass viewModel and factories to KnowledgeView.

userStories.title: Unit tests
userStories.description: Create tests in PIRATENTests/: FrontmatterParserTests (valid/malformed/missing frontmatter, quiz parsing, quoted values), ContentSectionParserTests (H2 splitting, special sections, callouts, edge cases), ReadingProgressStoreTests (save/retrieve/clear with injected UserDefaults). Swift Testing framework.
acceptanceCriteria: All parsing edge cases covered (valid, malformed, missing, empty)
Tests use Swift Testing framework (@Test, @testable import PIRATEN)

userStories.title: Update project documentation
userStories.description: Update Docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md with M8 section, Docs/DECISIONS.md with decisions (GitHub API, file cache, UserDefaults progress, custom YAML parser, native AttributedString), Docs/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md with new questions (progress sync, preload, offline bundle), README.md feature table.
acceptanceCriteria: DECISIONS.md has entries for all key architectural choices
